prompt: A vibrant anime-pop poster style selfie illustration of a young person carrying a Sphynx cat in a black front pet sling while holding a tan leash high in one hand. The person has short messy black hair, round glasses, and wears a black hoodie or dark oversized jacket; the face is intentionally obscured by a centered square blur block. The cat is the clear focal point in the lower center, a hairless pale pink Sphynx with very large ears, bright blue eyes, detailed skin folds, and a cozy brown knitted sweater with a collar. Use a dynamic upward selfie angle, with the raised fist and looping leash occupying the upper right. The background is a dense, celebratory amusement-park or festival scene rendered in explosive saturated colors, with electric blue dominating, plus confetti, paint splashes, stars, comic-style stickers, and playful signage. Include exactly 1 large Chinese headline at the top reading 带皮子出去玩 in oversized chunky bubble lettering with thick white outline and multicolor fill, exactly 1 pink paw-print icon near the headline, exactly 2 yellow exclamation marks near the raised hand, exactly 1 speech-bubble sticker on the left reading GO!, exactly 1 speech-bubble sticker on the right reading YEAH, exactly 1 paw-print speech bubble near the lower left, and exactly 2 pink heart icons near the cat. Make the composition feel energetic, cute, and chaotic, with bold cel-shaded outlines, glossy highlights, textured brush strokes, posterized lighting, high contrast, and a richly detailed neon comic aesthetic.
